description: Pure counting bucket. Prompts contain only object count and object noun. No color, material, scene-specific relation, or spatial relation is evaluated.

templates.template: Are there exactly {count_word} {object_plural} in the image?
Are there exactly {wrong_count_word} {object_plural} in the image?

reward_rule.note: Use only target_questions for reward computation.

non_overlap_note: No target questions about attributes, spatial relations, object existence, or scene context.
